commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Of Septuagint, "forgotten land. "Securos laticeslonga oblivia potant. (Virgil, Æneid vi.) (Calmet)
When dead, I shall not be able to sound forth thy praises before men: much less shall those do it, who are confined to the regions of darkness. (Worthington)
